items.briefing:
The US and allied governments, including Australia, have issued a warning about Russian threat actors actively targeting critical infrastructure. Australian organisations in sectors such as energy, utilities, and communications should be aware that these attacks are ongoing and may have downstream effects locally.

Separately, if your organisation uses Dropbox, be aware it now integrates with AI tools like ChatGPT and Claude. Review what files are stored there and consider whether sensitive organisational data could be exposed through these new AI features.

**Practical tip:** Check your Dropbox sharing settings today and ensure confidential documents are not accessible to third-party AI integrations without your knowledge.

featured.title: Financial services faces most cyberattacks per device
featured.quote: Australian financial services face disproportionate cyber threats due to legacy systems and slow patching practices.
